# Dye Solubilization Technique

**Summary**: A method to determine the critical micelle concentration (CMC) of a surfactant.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1987-ahmed|Ahmed, 1987]] used dye solubilization technique to determine the CMC of various surfactants.

## Key Results and Findings

- The point of adsorption maximum in Figure 2 was found to approximately coincide with the CMC of the surfactant. ([[1987-ahmed|Ahmed, 1987, p. 60]])
